Our Philosophy

Built by hand.
Heated by fire.
Rooted in place.

Every Fire and Land sauna is designed and built from the ground up in the Southern Okanagan. No kits, no shortcuts — just cedar, steel, and the kind of craftsmanship that outlasts trends.

We build off-grid, wood-fired saunas for people who want the real thing. Delivered to your property, placed with care, ready to fire.

8×8
Standard heating room
100%
Off-grid capable

Interior & exterior

The Stargazer

Our most refined build yet. A fiber optic starry ceiling hand-mapped with the Big Dipper and Milky Way. Double-paned sealed window. 32" covered porch. Harvia M3 wood-fired stove.

Cedar T&G · Harvia M3 wood stove

Every detail.
Intentional.

🔥

Wood-Fired Heat

Harvia wood-fired stoves for authentic löyly and heat that electric simply can't replicate. Off-grid by design — no power hookup required.

🌲

Cedar Construction

Western red cedar throughout — naturally resistant to moisture, dimensionally stable under heat, and beautiful to the touch and nose.

🪟

Double-Paned Windows

Sealed insulating glass units for heat retention and views. Natural light transforms the sauna experience from good to extraordinary.

🔒

WETT Certified

Every installation meets WETT standards. Full certification provided — essential for insurance and peace of mind on your property.

🚚

Crane Delivery

Built at our facility, delivered to yours. Placed precisely by Palfinger knuckle boom — even in tight or challenging access situations.

✦

Custom Options

Fiber optic starry ceilings, custom sizing, extended porches, and more. Every sauna is a conversation — we build what you envision.

Fiber Optic Ceiling Simulation

Signature Feature

THE NIGHT SKY above you

Our hand-mapped fiber optic ceiling brings the cosmos inside. Each star placed intentionally — the Big Dipper, the arc of the Milky Way — rendered in three sizes with independent twinkling. Lie back on the bench and lose yourself in the universe above.

This is the feature nobody expects and everyone remembers.

~100
Individual stars
3
Star sizes
Big Dipper
Constellation mapped
Milky Way
Arc included

How It Works

FROM CONVERSATION
TO STEAM

01

Inquire

Tell us about your property, your vision, and your timeline. We'll have a real conversation about what's possible.

02

Design & Deposit

We finalize the build specs together. A deposit secures your place in the build schedule.

03

Build

Your sauna is crafted at our facility. We document the build and keep you in the loop throughout.

04

Deliver & Place

We deliver on a flat deck trailer. A Palfinger truck — arranged by you — positions it precisely on your prepared pad. We complete the stove installation and walk you through firing it up.

Get in Touch

START YOUR
BUILD Let's talk.

We take on a limited number of builds each year. If you're serious about a Fire and Land sauna, reach out early. We'll have an honest conversation about timelines, pricing, and what's right for your property.

Location Southern Okanagan, BC
Delivery Area BC & Beyond
Starting Price From $29,800 CAD · delivered up to 300km

We respond to all inquiries within 48 hours. No pressure, no sales pitch — just a real conversation.
